note: Quet 07:2x BKK = 16/07 ~20:20 ET. Quet duoc CA 3 collection T1 (BogeyBros/BadBirdie/Swannies) -> nang nhan gia tu feed len core/collection. PHAT HIEN: BadBirdie co tier Pique $84 (day that, chua tung ghi) + Jacquard $94 + FT LS $98. BogeyBros sale depth thu hep 55.96(-20%) -> 59.46(-15%) tren 4 SKU raunchy = GIAM THAT. Bay republish lan 2: Swannies bulk republish 16/07 19:0x. Drop moi that duy nhat: P&A Youth Bomb Pop $54.95. BadBirdie gan badge RESTOCKED ~12 SKU nhung feed van available=false -> tin feed, khong tin badge.
